## Command

```bash
oss-pr-compass owner/repo
```

## Repository inspected

`owner/repo`

## Authentication

- [ ] I used `GITHUB_TOKEN` or `--token`
- [ ] I used unauthenticated GitHub API access

## Observed behavior

Describe the output, error, score, or signal that looked wrong.

## Expected behavior

Describe what should have happened instead.

## Extra context

Include relevant output, config, or links. Do not paste credentials or tokens.
